'''kalugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okayamalite|okayamalite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okayamalite|okayamalite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kalugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || kæligith || kæligij || kæligish || kæligi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || kaluluguth || kaluluguj || kalulugush || kalulugu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || kaluguth || kaluguj || kalugush || kalugu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || kalufgufth || kalufgufj || kalufgufsh || kalufguf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || kaluguthu || kaluguju || kalugushu || kaluguku
|-
| [[Patient]] || kaluguth || kaluguj || kalugush || kalugu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || kaluguthul || kalugujul || kalugushul || kalugukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || kaluguuthuthu || kaluguujuju || kaluguushushu || kaluguuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || kaluguthun || kalugujun || kalugushun || kalugukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || kaluguthuoro || kalugujuoro || kalugushuoro || kalugukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
